properties.titulo_evento: Spain into World Cup semi-final with France after late strike against Belgium

properties.descricao: At least 11 people, including a child, were injured after Russia launched an overnight missile and drone attack on Kyiv early Saturday. Our correspondent Gulliver Cragg tells us more.

properties.titulo_evento: World Cup 2022: Spain edge Belgium, set up semi-final showdown with France
properties.descricao: Spain booked their place in the World Cup semi-finals on Friday with a dramatic 2-1 victory over Belgium, sealed by a late winner from Mikel Merino. La Roja will now face France on Tuesday for a place in the final.

properties.titulo_evento: Germany's richest man takes on Big Tech

properties.titulo_evento: Mayor of Berlin says he won't run for reelection
properties.descricao: Berlin Mayor Kai Wegner withdrew from the reelection race this fall. His decision to play tennis during the power outage in January was among missteps that has dented his reputation.

properties.titulo_evento: Trump signals support for Patriot production in Ukraine
properties.descricao: US President Donald Trump says he may let Ukraine produce Patriot air defense missiles. Analysts welcome the move as a sign of support for the country — but warn it could take years before production begins.
